_meta.purpose: Request status report from spoke - NOT an executable instruction

_behavior_directive.what_this_is: A REQUEST for the inbox processor to generate a status report
_behavior_directive.what_this_is_NOT: An instruction for the AI agent to execute or implement
_behavior_directive.ai_agent_action: NONE - this is processed automatically before you see it
_behavior_directive.expected_outcome: A response lug appears in outbox/ with spoke status data

content.description: Inbox processor will read state files and generate a status report. No AI action required.

trigger_condition._note: Only process if spoke framework >= this version

_instructions_for_humans.for_hub_operator: Generate this task via phone_home_distributor.py. Place in hub outbox. Auto-teach delivers to spokes.
_instructions_for_humans.for_spoke_user: You should not see this - it's processed automatically on wakeup before your session starts.
_instructions_for_humans.if_you_see_this: The inbox processor should have handled this. Check WAI-Spoke/logs/heartbeat.jsonl for errors.
